name: bug-fix
description: Structured bug fix: reproduce, diagnose, fix, test, and verify

parameters.name: issue
parameters.description: Description of the bug to fix

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Module or area where the bug is likely located

parameters.name: test_command
parameters.description: Command to run tests (defaults to 'pnpm run test')

team.name: debugger
team.role: Senior debugger — reproduces issues, traces root causes, and applies minimal targeted fixes

team.name: verifier
team.role: QA verifier — confirms the fix works and no regressions are introduced

tasks.title: Diagnose {{issue}}
tasks.description: Investigate the bug: {{issue}}. Scope: {{scope}}. Steps: (1) Understand the expected vs actual behavior. (2) Find the root cause by reading the relevant code. (3) Write a diagnosis report explaining: what's broken, why, and where the fix should go. Be specific with file:line references.

expectations.criteria: The diagnosis clearly identifies the root cause with specific file:line references and explains why the bug occurs

tasks.title: Fix {{issue}}
tasks.description: Apply a minimal, targeted fix for: {{issue}}. Based on the diagnosis, change only what's necessary to resolve the root cause. Do NOT refactor unrelated code. Ensure all existing tests still pass.

tasks.title: Verify fix for {{issue}}
tasks.description: Verify the fix for: {{issue}}. Check: (1) the bug is actually resolved, (2) the fix addresses the root cause (not a workaround), (3) no regressions introduced, (4) test coverage is adequate for the fix.

expectations.criteria: The fix correctly resolves the root cause, is minimal and targeted, and introduces no regressions
